\tzpentry{ID4941}{Lagrangian}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4941 introduces Lagrangian as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} L(p) = \ln\left(\frac{p}{1-p}\right) \otimes n_i \in S^2 \end{equation}
